title: Cognition
heroH1: Cognition operates Devin, the first autonomous software engineer.
heroSubhead: We believe the purpose of technology is to expand human capacity — not by replacing meaningful work but by working alongside people as an exponential collaborator, helping them think deeper and move faster. We build tools for software creation because software shapes nearly every aspect of modern life. Cognition helps engineers operate more like architects: strategizing, designing systems, and focusing on problem solving, while agents handle the repetitive engineering work.
heroBodyContinued: Devin plans, writes, tests, and ships production code on its own, working inside your codebase and the tools your team already uses. Devin is deployed at some of the largest and most complex institutions in the world.

palette.notes: Light warm off-white background (#f7f6f5 ~= rgb(247,246,245)); black text; no dark mode detected. Minimal color palette — essentially monochrome with off-white ground.

fonts.notes: Two custom typefaces: nbInternational (headings/UI, grotesque sans) and stkBureauSerif (body copy, editorial serif). Fonts loaded via Next.js font optimization — no CDN URLs visible in network.

sections.label: 01 — Hero
sections.firstHeading: Cognition operates Devin, the first autonomous software engineer.
sections.gist: Mission statement + Devin product description. Devin plans, writes, tests, and ships production code autonomously. Deployed at large/complex institutions.
sections.fullText:
Cognition operates Devin, the first autonomous software engineer.

We believe the purpose of technology is to expand human capacity — not by replacing meaningful work but by working alongside people as an exponential collaborator, helping them think deeper and move faster. We build tools for software creation because software shapes nearly every aspect of modern life. Cognition helps engineers operate more like architects: strategizing, designing systems, and focusing on problem solving, while agents handle the repetitive engineering work.

Devin plans, writes, tests, and ships production code on its own, working inside your codebase and the tools your team already uses. Devin is deployed at some of the largest and most complex institutions in the world.

sections.label: 03 — Join the team
sections.gist: Careers pitch: defining the biggest shift in computing since the invention of software. Team of interdisciplinary makers. CTA: Explore roles.
sections.fullText:
Join the team

We're defining the biggest shift in computing since the invention of software. Cognition is a team of interdisciplinary makers who love working on the hardest problems in AI. If you're interested in supporting the world's leading enterprises and technology companies, come build with us.

Explore roles

animLib: CSS transitions (Tailwind) + IntersectionObserver — no third-party animation library detected
animLibNotes: No gsap/anime/framer/lottie/three/lenis globals found on window. No animation library CDN URLs in network requests — all scripts are Next.js chunks. CSS classes like 'transition-opacity duration-300' confirm Tailwind CSS transitions. IntersectionObserver is present (likely for scroll-triggered fade-ins). Animation approach is minimal: CSS opacity/transition only.

imagery.notes: 10 images — all blog post thumbnails (16:9, from Sanity CDN). No hero video or canvas. 32 SVGs (likely icons and logo). Page is predominantly typographic with no rich media in hero.

designObservations.theme: Light — warm off-white (#f7f6f5) background, black text. No dark mode.
designObservations.colorPalette: Near-monochrome. Off-white ground, black type, no accent colors detected.
designObservations.typography: Editorial mix: nbInternational (grotesque sans, headings/UI) + stkBureauSerif (serif, body). Suggests premium editorial aesthetic.
designObservations.layout: 12-column CSS grid (Tailwind grid utilities). Container max-width 1440px with 64px padding.
designObservations.sectionNumbering: Sections numbered 01–04 as visible labels — editorial magazine-style information architecture.
designObservations.density: Sparse. Very few CTAs (Contact x2, Explore roles). Confident, low-friction copy.
designObservations.heroApproach: Large typographic hero — no video, no canvas, no illustrations. Pure text on light ground.
designObservations.mobileNav: Separate mobile nav component (fixed, inset-x-0 top-0 z-60).
designObservations.pageLength: Short — body height ~1841px at 1440px wide. Single-scroll homepage.
